name: Tofu Fiesta
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute the onion and garlic in the oil until the onion is transparent.
2. Add the broccoli, carrots, pepper, mushrooms, and celery to the pan. Cook until all vegetables are tender.
3. Break the tofu into chunks and add it to the vegetable mixture along with turmeric and ricotta cheese.
4. Simmer everything together over low heat until thoroughly heated through.
5. Just before serving, stir in the cubed tomato and chopped parsley.
6. Sprinkle the toasted sesame seeds on top.
One serving is 1/2 recipe, containing approximately 383 calories, 25 grams of carbohydrates, 23 grams of protein, 23 grams of fat, 149 milligrams of sodium, and 1090 milligrams of potassium. This dish also provides 1 bread exchange, 2 vegetable exchanges, and 2 medium-fat meat plus 2 fat exchanges.
